reviews.body: I have had a mortgage with the Monmouthshire BS for 8 years - both during my working life and after retirement. At all times I have been treated with courtesy and given very helpful service from informed and efficient advisers who have shown considerable understanding of my individual situation (I am now 73) and have successfully matched products to my requirements at different times. I have also consulted independent mortgage advisers and visited mortgage comparison websites. On the last 3 occasions I have returned to the Monmouthshire because of their excellence.
Andrea was so helpful and explained everything.
Very personal and efficient, informative and easy to understand. very happy with progress.
Great service in Chepstow branch. Always happy to help in there and answer any queries.
Anita was so helpful and very friendly!

Anita my mortgage advisor was fantastic and so helpful going over all the options for my new mortgage, making sure it was the right one for me and looking at my affordability. A definite 10/10 for her!
A very professional new mortgage experience from start to finish.
Staff have been amazing. Always there to help if there’s a problem

I contacted MBS about porting my mortgage on a new property purchase. Jamie Warburton picked up the request, and has been nothing but brilliant ever since. Every step of the journey there more than adequate updates, explanations when they were needed, and other relevant information. I really felt like Jamie was on my side, really pled my case with the underwriters to get the mortgage offer over the line. For a process that has generally been quite stressful in the past, Jamie made it a lot less so, on top of probably a record time turnaround.
Visited today to move saving and update main saving plan. Service was efficient, staff were polite, clear and professional. Best of all it’s location.

I wanted to generate additional funds to invest in my property and thought about additional borrowing. After discussing with their advisor, they came up with a better and more cost efficient method of generating the funds.
Very positive experience, Jamie took the time to explain everything, was dedicated to our case and ensured we got everything across the line before our deadline.
